# 9.10 Controlling the input file generated by Abaqus/CAE







This section describes techniques you can use to control the input file generated by Abaqus/CAE. The following topics are covered:
- ["Adding unsupported keywords to your Abaqus/CAE model," Section 9.10.1](pt02ch09s09hlb01.md)
- ["Adding descriptions to your Abaqus/CAE model," Section 9.10.2](pt02ch09s09hlb02.md)
- ["Resolving conflicts in the input file," Section 9.10.3](pt02ch09s09hlb03.md)
- ["Writing input files without parts and assemblies," Section 9.10.4](pt02ch09s09hlb04.md)
